paper.title_en: Ringdown waves from hairy black holes
paper.abstract_en: We study how quasinormal-mode frequencies may encode information about the effective matter source responsible for black-hole hair. Using the established eikonal correspondence between quasinormal modes and unstable null geodesics, we relate shifts in the ringdown spectrum to perturbations of the photon-orbit frequency and Lyapunov exponent. The black hole hair is treated as an anisotropic fluid perturbatively added to the vacuum black holes (Schwarzschild and Kerr black holes). In particular, we derive formulas which allow one to directly read off deviations from the Schwarzschild or Kerr QNM spectrum in terms of the corresponding equation-of-state parameters of the anisotropic fluid. In this setting, regardless of the energy conditions, our formulas provide a systematic method for computing quasi-normal mode frequencies for a broad class of hairy black holes.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 研究通过类光测地线对应关系，建立毛状黑洞的QNM频率与各向异性流体状态参数的解析关系，方法系统、理论深入，适用于广泛的毛黑洞模型。
decision.title_zh: 来自毛状黑洞的振铃波
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了准正则模式频率如何编码关于产生黑洞毛的有效物质源的信息。利用已建立的准正则模式与不稳定零测地线之间的类光对应关系，我们将振铃谱的偏移与光子轨道频率和李雅普诺夫指数的扰动联系起来。黑洞毛被视为各向异性流体，扰动性地添加到真空黑洞（史瓦西黑洞和克尔黑洞）上。特别地，我们推导了公式，可以直接从各向异性流体的状态方程参数中读出史瓦西或克尔QNM谱的偏离。在此设定下，无论能量条件如何，我们的公式为计算一大类毛状黑洞的准正则模式频率提供了一种系统方法。
